name: Rishi Mule
title: ML/AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
about: Software engineer working at the intersection of applied machine learning and production systems. Five years across the stack — from CUDA kernels for protein folding to LangGraph agents that auto-review pull requests.

MS Computer Science from Northeastern University (3.96 GPA, Dec 2025). BE Computer Engineering from University of Mumbai (9.7/10). Won “Best Data Curation Plugin” at the Voxel51 + Twelve Labs hackathon (April 2026). Published research in IJRASET. Open to full-time SWE / ML roles.
